Elements.Text: ● If we know the type or properties of hashed data, then it is prone to rainbow table attack
● A rainbow table is a precomputed table for caching the output of cryptographic hash functions, usually for cracking password hashes

* /etc/passwd
* userid:hashed password:uid:gid:Name,phone,etc:home directory:shell
*
root:*:0:0:System Administrator:/var/root:/bin/sh
